content.problemStatement: In this task, we will create a program that automatically cleans and corrects a sentence by removing extra spaces and replacing "cats" with "cars" for proper formatting.
constraints: Each sentence length after trimming ≤ 100 characters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 100), the number of sentences. Each of the next T lines contains a sentence that may have leading or trailing spaces. Length of each line ≤ 100 characters (after trimming).
content.outputFormat:
For each sentence output two lines:
Original sentence: <sentence after removing leading and trailing spaces>
Auto-Corrected sentence: <sentence after trimming and replacing every occurrence of "cats" with "cars">

sampleTestCases.input:
2
I love cats so much!
I would like to have 2 cats
sampleTestCases.output:
Original sentence: I love cats so much!
Auto-Corrected sentence: I love cars so much!
Original sentence: I would like to have 2 cats
Auto-Corrected sentence: I would like to have 2 cars
sampleTestCases.explanation: Both sentences are trimmed (no extra spaces) and every occurrence of "cats" is replaced by "cars".

sampleTestCases.output:
Original sentence: cats and cats
Auto-Corrected sentence: cars and cars
sampleTestCases.explanation: Leading and trailing spaces are removed, then each "cats" becomes "cars".

sampleTestCases.output:
Original sentence: concatsation
Auto-Corrected sentence: concarsation
sampleTestCases.explanation: The substring "cats" inside a larger word is also replaced.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.input:
1
   cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats
hidden.expectedOutput:
Original sentence: cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats cats
Auto-Corrected sentence: cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars cars

hidden.label: edge case overlapping
hidden.expectedOutput:
Original sentence: catcats
Auto-Corrected sentence: catcars

hidden.label: general case 1
hidden.expectedOutput:
Original sentence: Cats are not cats
Auto-Corrected sentence: Cats are not cars

hidden.label: general case 2
hidden.expectedOutput:
Original sentence: Hello world
Auto-Corrected sentence: Hello world

solution.approach: For each test case read the whole line, trim leading and trailing whitespace, then scan the trimmed string from left to right. Whenever the next four characters equal "cats", append "cars" to the result and skip four positions; otherwise copy the current character. This works in O(L) time where L is the length of the sentence. The algorithm handles substrings inside larger words and overlapping occurrences correctly because we always move forward after a replacement.
solution.timeComplexity: O(total number of characters in all sentences) – each character is examined at most once.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(max length of a single sentence) for the output buffer.
